chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1811 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 23.10.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G Sindh a/w ASI Nazeer Ahmed Lashari of P.S B-Section Nawabshah Mr. Shahid Ahmed Shaikh, Additional P.G Sindh *** Mr. Muzamil Khan advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the petitioners, whereas Mr. Arshad Ali Keerio advocate files Vakalatnama of Mr. Parwaiz Ahmed Pirzada on behalf of respondent No.1, which are taken on record. Learned AAG files comments on behalf of respondents No.2 and 4 alongwith copies of certain documents, which are taken on record. Learned AAG submits that subject FIR has been recommended for disposal under C-class, therefore, this petition has become infructuous having served its purpose. On being confronted with the aforesaid position, learned counsel for the petitioners also seeks disposal of the petition. In view of the above, this petition has become infructuous and the same stands disposed of accordingly alongwith pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
